// 01 — About Me

THE PERSON BEHIND THE DATA

I'm a results-driven Data Analyst with ~3 years of experience specializing in SQL analytics, Power BI dashboards, and end-to-end BI solutions. I turn raw, complex datasets into decision-ready insights that directly drive business impact.

My project work spans Consumer Goods Sales Analysis — where I analyzed 1L+ transactions using T-SQL to uncover revenue leakage, payment gaps, and customer churn signals — Retail Sales & Customer Analysis using Power BI and DAX to track $725K in sales, 21% growth, and customer segmentation across regions — and Bank Customer Churn Analysis combining SQL and Power BI to identify attrition drivers and support retention strategy.

Driven by ownership, continuous learning, stakeholder collaboration, and business-focused analytics, I build scalable BI solutions that deliver measurable, real-world impact.

Bank Customer Churn Analysis
PROBLEM20.66% churn rate — no data on who was leaving, when, or why.
DATASET10K bank customers · Demographics, tenure, credit score, balance · 2016–2019
APPROACHSQL data prep + Power BI star schema + DAX for churn rate, exits & segment analysis
INSIGHTSFemale churn 56% higher · Fair credit = most exits · Inactive members = top churn driver
Impact
Data-backed retention strategy targeting high-risk segments → ~12% churn risk reduction

📊
Consumer Goods SQL Analytics — Built a structured SQL analytics layer across 9 source systems on 1L+ transactions. Uncovered a 33.5% order cancellation rate, ₹20.96 Cr revenue at risk from payment failures, and identified churn acceleration with 2,389 at-risk customers — replacing ad hoc Excel with production-ready T-SQL across revenue trends, returns, shipment, and customer segmentation.
🛍
Retail Sales & Growth Analytics — Led end-to-end Power BI dashboards tracking $2.27M+ in sales and 46.9% YoY growth. Developed customer & category segmentation supporting 18% improvement in campaign ROI.
👥
Customer Churn & Retention Analytics — Built SQL + DAX churn dashboards analyzing behavior across demographics, tenure, and usage. Identified high-risk segments, contributing to ~12% reduction in churn.
⚡
Automation & Reporting Efficiency — Automated recurring reports using SQL, Python, Power Query, and Power BI, reducing turnaround by 30–40% (~15 hours/week) and improving data reliability.
